prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: marketing still. Story world: Ward 1908. Premise: A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m.. Setting: Decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing. Threat presence: The Record Keeper. Recurring motifs: patient tags, flicker lights, stairwell echoes. Design vertical social launch creative with hook-forward typography zone and one undeniable clue motif.. Subgenre: haunted institution. Tone: SLOW_BURN. Immediate scene brief: Ward 1908 Social Launch Vertical. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-contrast marketing still with a clean focal read, premium horror mood, and room for external campaign copy to be added later.
